hero.title: Egyptian Education
hero.subtitle: From Kindergarten to High School
hero.description: Enjoy a unique educational experience with Eman-Academy. We provide the Egyptian and Al-Azhar curriculum for your children with exceptional quality and competitive prices with a select group of the best teachers.

diasporaBanner.title: You work far away,
diasporaBanner.description: We understand work pressure abroad and time zone differences. We designed our platform to give you peace of mind while your child prepares for Egyptian exams professionally.

benefits.sectionDescription: We offer a comprehensive educational experience that ensures your children's excellence through the latest technologies and the best teaching staff

curriculum.title: Accredited Curricula
curriculum.description: Comprehensive explanation of Egyptian, Al-Azhar, and language curricula with high accuracy and compliance with the latest ministerial specifications.

teachers.title: Elite Teachers
teachers.description: A team of the best male and female teachers with extensive experience in online teaching and dealing with students.

tracking.title: Continuous Monitoring
tracking.description: Periodic tests, electronic homework, and detailed performance reports for parents to monitor student progress continuously.

usp.quote: "Others teach lessons. We prepare your child for the real exam."

points.dedicated: 100% dedicated to Egyptians abroad - we are not a general platform
points.notTutoring: Not private tutoring - Egyptian exam readiness system
points.smartTracking: Smart tracking that considers time zone differences
points.examSimulation: Real exam simulation with advanced performance analysis

liveClasses.title: Interactive Live Classes
liveClasses.description: Live explanation from specialized teachers with the ability to interact and participate immediately.

recordedLessons.title: Recorded Lessons Library
recordedLessons.description: All classes are available for viewing at any time with the ability to rewatch.

homework.title: Interactive Homework
homework.description: Electronic exercises and homework with instant correction and performance improvement guidance.

quizzes.title: Periodic Tests
quizzes.description: Regular assessment tests to measure progress and identify strengths and weaknesses.

progress.title: Advanced Reports
progress.description: Accurate reports showing student level and skills acquired periodically.

support.title: 24/7 Technical Support
support.description: Support team in constant contact with you and your child to solve any technical or educational problem.

testimonials.sectionDescription: Real testimonials from parents who trust us

pricing.sectionDescription: Choose the plan that suits your child's needs

cta.description: Join thousands of families who chose Eman-Academy to educate their children

footer.aboutDescription: Eman-Academy is a leading educational platform that provides Egyptian and Al-Azhar curricula with high quality for students in Egypt and abroad.

highlights.title: Eduverse Platform – A Unique Learning Experience
highlights.liveDesc: Personal Zoom accounts for each student for effective interaction.
highlights.calendarDesc: Uploaded to the platform with an automatic copy sent to parents via WhatsApp.
highlights.platformDesc: Comprehensive tools supporting the student throughout the learning journey.
highlights.recordingsDesc: Permanent access to all curriculum content recordings.
highlights.bankDesc: Training according to student level considering individual differences.
highlights.homeworkDesc: Grading with written and voice comments for pronunciation and reading.
highlights.parentDesc: Track grades, attendance, absence, and completed tasks.
highlights.groupsDesc: 15-20 students per class to ensure quality interaction and follow-up.

admin.desc: Access for system administrators and supervisors
